decks.notes: The main focus of this Boros Aggro deck is to quickly and aggressively pressure the opponent with efficient creatures and direct damage spells. With a mix of powerful creatures like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Ranger-Captain of Eos, supported by cards like Goblin Bombardment and Lightning Bolt, the deck aims to close out games quickly before the opponent has a chance to stabilize. The inclusion of cards like Ajani, Nacatl Pariah and Voice of Victory provide additional value and support to the aggressive strategy, making this deck a formidable force in the Modern format.

This Modern 1 vs 1 deck focuses on generating mana quickly through various rituals and cantrips, while utilizing Ral, Monsoon Mage to filter through the deck and generate additional card advantage. The key strategy revolves around casting multiple spells in one turn to trigger Ral's ability and dealing a large amount of damage with Grapeshot. The main combo involves casting spells to generate mana, then casting Past in Flames from the graveyard to recast previously played spells. Additionally, the deck includes Wish to search for specific cards to further enhance the combo potential.

Utilize a variety of versatile control spells and removal to maintain board presence and disrupt opponent's strategy, while generating card advantage and selection with card draw and library manipulation. Use efficient counterspells and removal to keep opponent at bay, while generating card advantage through drawing and filtering spells. Use powerful creatures like Wan Shi Tong, Librarian and Orcish Bowmasters to provide additional threats and card advantage. Use lands like Field of Ruin to disrupt opponent's mana base and control key lands. Overall, focus on control and disruption to outsmart and outlast opponent.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly ramp up mana using Eldrazi Temple and Green Sun's Zenith to cast powerful Eldrazi creatures like Emrakul, the Promised End. The deck also focuses on controlling the board using cards like Kozilek's Command and Ugin's Labyrinth, while also generating additional advantage through cards like Disciple of Freyalise and Sowing Mycospawn. The inclusion of Fight Rigging and Malevolent Rumble helps to disrupt opponent's strategies and protect your own creatures. Overall, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents with big threats while maintaining control of the game.

This deck focuses on aggressive and efficient creatures, using cards like Ragavan, Nimble Pilferer and Scion of Draco to quickly deal damage to the opponent. It also utilizes Leyline of the Guildpact to pump up its creatures and Leyline Binding for control. Consign to Memory and Fable of the Mirror-Breaker provide card advantage and disruption. The deck includes a mix of fetch lands and shock lands for mana fixing and consistency. Overall, the strategy is to apply early pressure and maintain board presence to overwhelm the opponent.

The deck focuses on utilizing Eldrazi creatures and ramp spells to quickly generate large amounts of mana and control the board. Emrakul, the Promised End and Sire of Seven Deaths provide powerful threats, while Ugin, the Eye of Storms and Kozilek's Return offer removal and card advantage. The deck aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan with counterspells and sweepers, while setting up for a game-winning Eldrazi play. The mana base is optimized for consistency and acceleration, allowing for explosive plays in the mid-to-late game.

This deck focuses on using cards like Violent Outburst and Living End to quickly cycle through creatures and disrupt the opponent's board state. By utilizing cards like Street Wraith and Endurance to fill up the graveyard, the deck can then cast Living End to bring back high-value creatures like Striped Riverwinder and Curator of Mysteries. With the ability to generate card advantage and overwhelm the opponent with powerful creatures, the deck aims to win through a fast and explosive combo play.

The main idea of this deck is to control the game using a combination of counterspells, removal spells, and planeswalkers to dominate the board and disrupt the opponent's strategy. The deck focuses on card advantage and efficiency, using cards like Consult the Star Charts and Meticulous Archive to draw cards and find answers. Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Teferi, Time Raveler provide additional control and card advantage, while Solitude and Supreme Verdict deal with threats on the board. The deck aims to outvalue and outmaneuver the opponent to secure a victory.

The main concept of this deck is to combine aggressive creatures with flicker effects to constantly replay and reuse powerful creatures, gaining tempo and advantage over your opponent. By blinking creatures like Phelia, Exuberant Shepherd and Starfield Shepherd with cards like Ephemerate and Marsh of Otherworldly Light, you can overwhelm your opponent with an army of creatures while disrupting their game plan. The deck aims to apply pressure early and maintain it throughout the game, utilizing the synergy between creatures and blink effects to gain a strategic advantage.

The key focus of this deck is to utilize the synergy between Basking Broodscale and Blade of the Bloodchief to create a powerful combo. By using cards like Ancient Stirrings to search for key pieces and ramping through Eldrazi Temple, the deck aims to quickly assemble the combo pieces. With support from Glaring Fleshraker and Malevolent Rumble to control the board and disrupt the opponent, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with a powerful board presence, ultimately leading to victory through efficient combo execution and strong creature attacks.

The main concept of this deck is to assemble a powerful combo utilizing various spells and abilities without relying on traditional land cards. The deck focuses on controlling the board with counterspells and disruptive spells while ramping up mana with cards like Lotus Bloom and Sea Gate Restoration. The goal is to ultimately win the game with cards like Goblin Charbelcher and Tameshi, Reality Architect, creating a unique and powerful win condition that can catch opponents off guard. The deck requires precise timing and strategic decision-making to control the game and execute the combo successfully.

This deck focuses on using powerful control spells and creatures to dominate the game. It includes cards like Fatal Push and Thoughtseize to disrupt opponents' strategies, while also utilizing cards like Consuming Corruption and Soul Spike to gain life and deal with threats. The deck also features powerful finishers like Sheoldred, the Apocalypse and Troll of Khazad-dûm to close out the game. Additionally, the deck includes cards that allow for resource manipulation and card advantage, such as Sign in Blood and Night's Whisper. Overall, this deck aims to control the game and outvalue opponents to secure victory.

This deck focuses on quickly deploying artifacts and leveraging their synergy to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of aggression and disruption. It aims to quickly build a board presence using cards like Mox Opal and Mishra's Bauble, while also utilizing cards like Engineered Explosives and Welding Jar to control the battlefield. Additionally, the deck utilizes the powerful land Urza's Saga to tutor for key artifacts and generate additional value. This combination of speed, resilience, and versatility makes the deck a formidable force in the Modern format.

The key concept of this deck is to quickly play out aggressive creatures like Monastery Swiftspear and Dragon's Rage Channeler, while using cheap spells like Lava Dart and Lightning Bolt to clear the way for attacks. The deck also utilizes cards like Mishra's Bauble and Preordain to filter out cards and find the necessary pieces to maintain pressure on the opponent. Violent Urge and Slickshot Show-Off provide additional damage and card advantage, while Mutagenic Growth can help pump up creatures for lethal attacks. The deck focuses on speed and efficiency to overwhelm the opponent and win the game quickly.

This UW Control deck aims to dominate the game with a combination of counterspells, card draw, and board wipes. By utilizing powerful Planeswalkers like Teferi, Time Raveler and Narset, Parter of Veils, the deck aims to control the tempo of the game and shut down opponent's strategies. With a focus on card advantage and disruption, the deck aims to protect its own threats while neutralizing threats from the opponent. The inclusion of cards like Supreme Verdict and Prismatic Ending allows for efficient removal of threats, while the companion Kaheera, the Orphanguard provides additional value and synergy with the deck's strategy.

The main concept of this UW Control deck is to establish board and hand control through counterspells, card draw, and removal spells. The deck aims to stall the opponent's game plan while generating card advantage with Narset, Parter of Veils and Lórien Revealed. It also utilizes powerful planeswalkers like Teferi, Hero of Dominaria and Teferi, Time Raveler to control the pace of the game. With a mix of board wipes like Supreme Verdict and spot removal like Prismatic Ending, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent to secure victory.
